Jupiter is posited in 1 I th to Mars. With this, it is understood, that

During 2005-06.even though .Rahu in transit is. in Meena,
a North Direction Sign, Cancer is also a North Direction Sign,
Rahu's component will also apply to Cancer Sign. That means,
Mars + Venus + Moon's Component of Transit Rahu will form.
Both Mars and Rahu are inimical, to each other. With this reason,
she has the intense anxiety and panic about her husband.
